amount.title: Amount (USD)
amount.description: Goodwill amount in dollars (defaults to 5, capped at 50).

chatSummary.title: Chat Summary
chatSummary.description: ALWAYS pass this. Faithful summary/transcript of the store credit conversation so the solved service Case has context.

confirmed.title: Confirmed by Shopper
confirmed.description: True only after the shopper accepts this goodwill credit.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Why the credit is being issued.

verifiedEmail.title: Verified Email
verifiedEmail.description: Pass the loggedInEmail variable. Required to issue credit.
